data.title: The second season of Cap's points event, Homestead, will run from January 29th to July 23rd.
data.description: Stablecoin project Cap has announced the details of its second-quarter points program, Homestead, which will run from January 29th to July 23rd. Similar to the first-quarter program, Frontier, users can choose between points or rewards: stcUSD will offer rewards in the form of cUSD, paid out daily; users who choose points can earn rewards by holding cUSD, Pendle cUSD YT and LP, Pendle stcUSD YT and LP, or by providing stablecoin loans to stcUSD and Cap PT in the lending market.

data.title: Spot gold rose above $4,950 per ounce, setting a new all-time high.
data.description: Spot gold rose above $4,950 per ounce to a new all-time high, currently trading at $4,957 per ounce, up 0.44% on the day.

data.title: Farcaster founder clarifies: The protocol is currently functioning normally, and the funds for the home purchase came from Coinbase IPO proceeds.
data.description: Farcaster founder Dan Romero clarifies the following points regarding market rumors: 1. Farcaster has no plans to shut down. The protocol is currently functioning normally and will continue to operate stably in the future. As of December last year, it had 250,000 monthly active users and over 100,000 deposited wallets. The acquiring company, Neynar, is a venture-backed startup that plans to shift Farcaster towards a more developer-focused approach. 2. Regarding the Merkle project, we plan to return all $180 million raised to investors. Over the past five years, we have consistently strived to manage investor funds prudently. 3. Finally, it should be noted that the funds used to purchase the property came from the proceeds of Coinbase's initial public offering (IPO).

data.title: Bitmine has staked another 171,264 ETH, bringing its total staked amount to 1,943,200 ETH.
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that the Bitmine address has staked another 171,264 ETH, worth approximately $503.24 million. Its total staked ETH now amounts to 1,943,200 ETH, with a total value of approximately $5.73 billion.

data.title: A whale address starting with 0xfb7 purchased another 20,013 ETH from FalconX.
data.description: OnchainLens monitoring shows that a whale address starting with 0xfb7 bought another 20,013 ETH from FalconX, worth approximately $59 million. Its ETH holdings have increased to 80,115, with an estimated value of approximately $236.55 million.

data.title: Where crypto market structure bill stands now
data.description:
The digital assets market stands still while US lawmakers are moving closer to a committee vote on a crypto structure bill. However, reports suggest that there are deep political divisions that still remain, and bipartisan support looks uncertain. The industry leaders have also shared their separate views on the bill. On one hand, Brian Armstrong, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/where-crypto-market-structure-bill-stands-now/

data.title: Kansas Introduces Bill to Establish a Crypto Strategic Reserve
data.description:
Kansas has formally entered the growing conversation around state-level digital asset strategy. On January 22, lawmakers introduced Senate Bill No. 352, a proposal that would authorize the creation of a Bitcoin and digital asset strategic reserve held by the state treasury. The bill positions Kansas among a small but expanding group of U
source: https://www.techgaged.com/kansas-introduces-bill-to-establish-a-crypto-strategic-reserve/

data.title: Bubblemaps: The average airdrop amount for SKR tokens is $1,400, and a total of 60,000 addresses have claimed them.
data.description: According to data disclosed by Bubblemaps, since the launch of Solana Mobile's token SKR, a total of 60,000 wallet addresses have claimed tokens worth $70 million, with an average airdrop amount of $1,400.

data.title: Coinbase Forms Advisory Committee on Quantum Computing Risks
data.description:
Coinbase establishes an advisory committee to address quantum computing threats to blockchain, aiming to secure future crypto assets.

data.title: Coinbase Creates Advisory Board to Study Quantum Computing Risks to Bitcoin
data.description:
Coinbase said the group will assess how future quantum advances could affect blockchain security and outline long-term solutions.
source: https://decrypt.co/355565/coinbase-advisory-board-quantum-computing-risks-bitcoin

data.title: South Korea’s Seized Bitcoin Vanishes in Major Phishing Heist – Prosecutors Probe $300M Loss
data.description:
South Korean prosecutors lost a substantial amount of seized Bitcoin to a phishing attack, after wallet passwords stored on USB drives were exposed during a routine inspection of confiscated crypto assets, prompting an ongoing investigation into the missing funds.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korea-bitcoin-phishing-heist-probe/
